title: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the...
title_en: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the...
title_uk: Вшанували загиблих українських воїнів разом із...
description: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. Thank you to Cyrus and Great Britain for the constant respect for our soldiers, for all those who gave their all for the defense of Ukraine and the whole of Europe. It is important to always remember the feat of all our people who defended Ukraine. Eternal gratitude to everyone who defended Ukraine from Russian aggression.
description_en: Tributes were paid to the fallen Ukrainian soldiers together with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. Thank you to Cyrus and Great Britain for the constant respect for our soldiers, for all those who gave their all for the defense of Ukraine and the whole of Europe. It is important to always remember the feat of all our people who defended Ukraine. Eternal gratitude to everyone who defended Ukraine from Russian aggression.
description_uk: Віддали шану загиблим українським воїнам разом із Прем’єр-міністром Великої Британії Кіром Стармером. Дякую Кіру та Великій Британії за незмінну повагу до наших воїнів, до всіх, хто віддав найдорожче заради захисту України і всієї Європи. Важливо завжди пам’ятати про подвиг усіх наших людей, які захищали Україну. Вічна вдячність кожному й кожній, хто боронив Україну від російської агресії.

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
title_uk: Безпілотний удар
description: Maritime drones of the SBU attacked two tankers of the Russian "shadow fleet" in the Black Sea. The ships Louise 1 and Banda, which were used to transport Russian oil to circumvent Western sanctions, were hit. Russian aviation tried to destroy the drones with machine gun fire and bombs, but without success.
description_en: Maritime drones of the SBU attacked two tankers of the Russian "shadow fleet" in the Black Sea. The ships Louise 1 and Banda, which were used to transport Russian oil to circumvent Western sanctions, were hit. Russian aviation tried to destroy the drones with machine gun fire and bombs, but without success.
description_uk: Морские дроны СБУ отработали по двум танкерам российского «теневого флота» в Черном море Под удар попали суда Louise 1 и Banda, которые использовались для перевозки российской нефти в обход западных санкций. руснявая авиация пыталась уничтожить дроны пулеметным огнем и бомбами, но безуспешно.

title: Shelling on residential area
title_en: Shelling on residential area
title_uk: Обстріли житлових масивів
description: Rinat Akhmetov will buy an apartment for the scientist Mykhailo Vysotsky, whose house was destroyed by a Russian rocket. The tragedy happened on July 2, during massive shelling, one of the rockets hit the apartment building where the scientist lived. He and his family survived. The fire also destroyed a unique 150-year-old family archive: books, paintings by famous Ukrainian artists, family photos and scientific works...
description_en: Rinat Akhmetov will buy an apartment for the scientist Mykhailo Vysotsky, whose house was destroyed by a Russian rocket. The tragedy happened on July 2, during massive shelling, one of the rockets hit the apartment building where the scientist lived. He and his family survived. The fire also destroyed a unique 150-year-old family archive: books, paintings by famous Ukrainian artists, family photos and scientific works...
description_uk: Рінат Ахметов придбає квартиру науковцю Михайлу Висоцькому, житло якого зруйнувала російська ракета Трагедія сталась 2-го липня, під час масованого обстрілу, одна із ракет влучила в багатоквартирний будинок, де проживав науковець. Він та його рідні вціліли. Вогонь, також, знищив унікальний сімейний 150-річний архів: книги, картини відомих українських художників, сімейні світлини та наукові праці...

description: 🤦‍♂️ Poland will protect "sensitive sectors" during the negotiations on Ukraine's accession to the EU 🎙 Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs of Poland Ignacy Niemczycki said that Warsaw will defend its own interests in the most sensitive sectors, in particular in the agricultural sector. 💭 "We have sectors that are considered the most sensitive, where we have to take care of our interests, and we will do it," said Nemchytskyi. 🥴 The Polish diplomat explained that...
description_en: 🤦‍♂️ Poland will protect "sensitive sectors" during the negotiations on Ukraine's accession to the EU 🎙 Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs of Poland Ignacy Niemczycki said that Warsaw will defend its own interests in the most sensitive sectors, in particular in the agricultural sector. 💭 "We have sectors that are considered the most sensitive, where we have to take care of our interests, and we will do it," said Nemchytskyi. 🥴 The Polish diplomat explained that...
description_uk: 🤦‍♂️ Польща захищатиме «чутливі сектори» на переговорах про вступ України до ЄС 🎙 Заступник глави МЗС Польщі Ігнацій Нємчицький заявив, що Варшава відстоюватиме власні інтереси в найбільш чутливих галузях, зокрема в аграрній сфері. 💭 «Ми маємо сектори, які вважаються найбільш чутливими, де мусимо дбати про наші інтереси, і ми це робитимемо», — заявив Нємчицький. 🥴 Польський дипломат пояснив, що...
